name: Cranberry-Orange Ice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine the sugar and orange juice.
2. Stir over medium heat until the sugar dissolves.
3. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
4. Stir in the cranberry juice cocktail.
5. Pour into an ice cream canister.
6. Freeze according to manufacturer's directions. Makes 2 quarts
